name: Jared Huffman
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $122,968 for Jared Huffman in U.S. House, CA-02. Public statements and congressional records indicate this candidate has taken a stance aligned with Israel-focused security policy framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
